validation_command: python -c "import pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('scripts/run/hb_autotest.py'); src=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'HB_AUTO_COMMIT' in src, 'HB_AUTO_COMMIT env var ausente'; assert 'allowlist' in src.lower(), 'Allowlist validation ausente'; assert 'abort' in src.lower() or 'return' in src, 'Abort-on-violation ausente'; assert 'auto_commit_if_enabled' in src, 'Função auto_commit_if_enabled ausente'; print('✅ hb_autotest auto-commit validado: opt-in + allowlist + abort')"
